rate_limited: ⏳ Too many requests. Please wait a minute and try again.
contract_not_configured: ⚠️ Contract not configured. Please wait for mainnet launch.
start.welcome:
🔒 *Welcome to WillChain Bot*

I will monitor your wallet activity and protect your vault.

*What I do:*
• Automatic activity tracking
• Notifications for entering the grace period
• Network statistics updates

*Note:* If you are actively using your wallet, activity is tracked automatically. Manual confirmation is only needed for inactive wallets.

Link your wallet to get started!
link.invalid_address: ❌ Invalid Ethereum address. Please check and try again.
link.cooldown: ⏳ You can change your linked wallet in {{hours}}h. This prevents address theft.
link.challenge:
🔐 *Confirm Wallet Ownership*

Open the link in your browser and sign the request with your wallet:

{{url}}

_The link is valid for 5 minutes._
verify.no_challenge:
❌ Challenge not found or expired.

Please start again with `/link 0xYourAddress`
verify.address_mismatch:
❌ Signature does not match the requested address.

Ensure you signed with the correct wallet, and try `/link` again.
verify.invalid_signature: ❌ Invalid signature format. Please try again.
verify.success:
✅ *Wallet linked successfully!*

Address: `{{address}}`

You will now receive:
• Weekly activity reminders
• Grace period alerts
• Status updates

Use /status to check your vault's condition.
status.fetch_failed: ❌ Failed to fetch status. Please try again later.
status.unregistered_hint: ℹ️ *Your wallet is not yet registered. Activate your vault via the dApp.*
status.urgent_hint: ⚠️ *URGENT: Confirm activity NOW to prevent asset loss!*
status.body:
{{emoji}} *Vault Status: {{status}}*

📍 Address: `{{address}}`
⏱ Days until inactivity: *{{daysInactive}}*
📅 Inactivity Period: *{{periodDays}} days*
👤 Successor: {{successor}}
🏷 Tier: {{tier}}

_Tip: Any on-chain activity will automatically confirm your presence._
stats.fetch_failed: ❌ Failed to fetch statistics. Please try again later.
unlink.success: ✅ Wallet unlinked. You will no longer receive notifications.
email.info:
📧 *Email Notifications*

{{current}}

To set or update your email:
`/email your@email.com`

You will receive alerts for:
• Successor assignments
• Claim initiations
• Grace period warnings
email.invalid: ❌ Invalid email address. Please check and try again.
email.saved:
✅ *Email Saved*

You will receive notifications at: `{{email}}`

To remove email notifications, use `/email remove`.
help.text:
❓ *How WillChain Works*

*Activity Confirmation:*
• Any on-chain activity (transfers, swaps, mints) automatically confirms you are alive
• Manual confirmation is only needed for fully inactive wallets
• Choose your inactivity period: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days

*Timeline After Period Ends:*
1️⃣ Grace Period (30 days) — warnings are sent
2️⃣ Claim Period (30 days) — successor can claim funds
3️⃣ Only if unclaimed — assets are recycled

*What Happens to Recycled Assets:*
🔥 47% is burned forever
👥 47% is distributed to active holders
🏛 5% to the protocol treasury
🦅 1% to the claim initiator

*Bot Commands:*
/link <address> — Start wallet linking
/verify <signature> — Complete wallet linking
/unlink — Remove wallet linking
/email <address> — Set email notifications
/status — Check vault status
/stats — Network statistics
/notifications — Toggle reminders

Stay active, stay protected! 🔒
callback.link_wallet:
🔗 *Link Wallet*

Step 1 - Request a signature:
`/link 0xYourWalletAddress`

Step 2 - Sign the message and submit:
`/verify 0xYourSignature`
cron.urgent:
🚨 *URGENT: {{days}} days until inactivity!*

Your WillChain vault requires attention.
Period: {{period}} days

_Tip: Any on-chain activity will confirm automatically._
Or tap below to confirm manually.
cron.warning:
⚠️ *Reminder: {{days}} days remaining*

Your vault is active.
Period setting: {{period}} days

_If you're actively using your wallet - no action needed!_
cron.weekly:
👋 *Weekly Status*

Your vault: Active ✅
Days remaining: {{days}}
Period: {{period}} days

_Using your wallet? Activity is tracked automatically._
cron.grace_alert:
🔴 *CRITICAL: Your vault has entered the GRACE PERIOD!*

You have *{{daysAbandoned}} days* before your successor can claim your assets.

Your settings: {{periodDays}} days of inactivity
Total timeout: {{totalDays}} days

If unclaimed, assets will be recycled:
• 47% burned
• 47% to active holders
• 5% protocol treasury
• 1% to recycler

*ACT NOW to save your vault!*
_Any transaction from your wallet will automatically confirm activity._
notify.claim_initiated:
🚨 *CRITICAL ALERT: Claim initiated!*

Someone is attempting to claim your vault!

📍 Your Wallet: `{{owner}}`
👤 Claimant: `{{successor}}`
⏱ Time: {{time}}

*You have 30 days to veto this claim!*
Confirm activity NOW to cancel the claim.
notify.activity_confirmed:
✅ *Activity Confirmed!*

Your vault's timer has been reset.
Inactivity Period: {{periodDays}} days
Next Deadline: {{nextDeadline}}

_Tip: Any on-chain activity will automatically confirm your presence._
notify.vault_transferred_from:
⚠️ *Vault Transfer Completed*

Access to your vault has been transferred to your designated successor.

From: `{{from}}`
To: `{{to}}`
Amount: {{amount}} WILL
notify.vault_transferred_to:
🎉 *You have received vault access!*

The vault has been transferred to you as the designated successor.

From: `{{from}}`
Amount: {{amount}} WILL

Remember to confirm activity to keep the vault active!
notify.successor_updated:
✅ *Successor Updated*

Your designated successor has been set:
`{{successor}}`

They will be able to claim your vault after {{periodDays}} days of inactivity + a 30-day grace period.
notify.successor_named:
📋 *You have been designated as a successor*

Wallet `{{owner}}` has named you as their successor.

*What this means:*
• If the owner becomes inactive, you will be able to claim their vault
• You will be notified when the claim becomes available

_No action is required at this time._
notify.vault_registered:
🎉 *Vault Registered!*

Your wallet is now registered with the WillChain protocol.

📍 Address: `{{address}}`

*What's next:*
• Use /status to check your status
• Assign a successor via the dashboard
• Any outgoing transfer will automatically confirm activity
api.verify_success:
✅ *Wallet linked successfully!*

Address: `{{address}}`

You will now receive notifications about your will's status. Use /status to check.
